name: ccproxy-agent
description: A local orchestration proxy above ccswitch for compaction, token budgeting, and multimodal routing.

scripts.build:gui: npm run build && esbuild ./src/gui-preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:electron --outfile=dist/gui-preload.cjs && powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist\gui | Out-Null; Copy-Item src\gui\* dist\gui\ -Recurse -Force"
scripts.package:exe: npm run build && npm run bundle:pkg && pkg build/pkg/index.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output release/ccproxy-agent.exe && powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force release | Out-Null; Copy-Item config.json release\config.json -Force"
scripts.package:gui: npm run build:gui && electron-builder --win portable && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Copy-Item config.json release-gui\config.json -Force"
